docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,240.00 FILED BY NAJDAWI, DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT ZAGOROV, NIKOLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
